userId.description: The UID of the user who created the booking.

name.description: The name of the person booking.

department.description: The department of the person booking.

startTime.description: The start time of the booking (HH:MM).

endTime.description: The end time of the booking (HH:MM).

rating.description: Optional rating given to the booking experience (1-5).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the booking was created.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the booking should be automatically deleted (7 days after booking date).

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: User feedback and rating for a booking.

bookingId.description: The ID of the booking this feedback is for.

userId.description: The UID of the user who submitted the feedback.

rating.description: Rating given to the booking experience (1-5).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the feedback was created.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the feedback should be automatically deleted (14 days after submission).

/feedback/{feedbackId}.description: Stores all user feedback and ratings.
